isolation_opt_out_reason: Meta-feature orchestrating 9 sub-features. Each sub-feature will auto-isolate via scripts/create-isolated-worktree.py when its own current_phase changes. The meta-feature itself only mutates this state.json + the case-study + data-collection ledger; those writes happen on a feature branch but not in a separate worktree (would create excessive nesting). Q3 override per v7.8.1 protocol.

prd.approved_note: PRD locked at experiment open as start-state baseline; closed at experiment end with PRD-vs-execution gap analysis (case study §99).

tasks.approved_note: 9 sub-feature task blocks defined at experiment open; tasks[].status reflects per-sub-feature resolution at experiment end (1 shipped, 1 already-complete, 1 partial-reconciled, 6 deferred). Experiment-style closure semantics — see F10 candidate in case study §99.

ux_or_integration.skipped_reason: Meta-feature has no UI; sub-features ran their own UX phase independently.

implementation.approved_note: Meta-feature has no commits of its own (the experiment IS the implementation). Sub-feature S3-G2 produced fitme-story squash 8e595b3 (PR #58).

testing.approved_note: Experimental data captured in data-collection.json with 3 pre-registered hypotheses + verdicts. Sub-feature S3-G2 had its own testing pass (tsc + next build clean).

risks: F9 gate-cascade effect when closing meta-features
review.approved_note: Self-review against PRD hypotheses + success metrics + kill criteria written in case study §99.

merge.approved_note: Meta-feature itself has no FT2 PR (the experiment apparatus); only sub-feature S3-G2 shipped (fitme-story#58).

documentation.showcase_mdx_path_note: Experiment journal-style case study; no user-facing showcase MDX warranted (internal protocol research).

primary.name: subfeatures_completed_in_session
primary.baseline_note: ucc-passkey-auth completed 1 full feature cycle in ~125 min on 2026-05-07 (the precedent baseline)
primary.target_note: 3 sub-features through Phase 8 closure within 4-hour session

secondary.name: tier_2_2_log_emit_compliance
secondary.note: fraction of phase transitions with Tier 2.2 log within 15-min window

metrics.kill_criteria: If any guardrail breaches, halt the experiment and revert to backup at ~/Documents/FitTracker2-backups/2026-05-07-pre-roadmap-stress-test/. If protocol overhead exceeds 25% of step duration (Tier 2.2 logging + state.json mutations + pre-commit fixups), declare protocol-breaking and report.
metrics.kill_criteria_resolution: 0 kill criteria breached. K1 (high-risk Swift files): 0 touched. K2 (main CI red): both repos green at session close. K3 (protocol overhead > 25%): per-step overhead was 0% on S3-G2; H2 partial-refuted on a separate ground (apparatus-setup-as-overhead malformed for single-feature sessions, not a per-step problem). Backup retained as historical record; no rollback needed.

tasks.experiment_outcome_note: 5/10 done with evidence pointers; 5 blocked external (Apple Dev Program). Reconciled in this session.

tasks.title: onboarding-v2-retroactive refactor into v2/ subdir per V2 Rule. DS Residual: 9 raw literals (onboarding subset) + VoiceOver labels (start)
tasks.experiment_outcome_note: Shipped 2026-05-05 via iOS audit H-2 before experiment opened.

tasks.title: Refine case-study presentation/readability (fitme-story side)
tasks.experiment_outcome_note: S3-G2 shipped (fitme-story#58); G3 + G5 deferred per scope decision.

tasks.title: Code Connect (Figma ↔ code mapping, iOS Figma file). DS Residual: Figma old frame cleanup (finish)
tasks.experiment_outcome_note: Roadmap dependency error caught at reality-check; not started.

tasks.title: Research mode: complete Figma design + architecture for both surfaces (Phase 0 only). DS Residual: Android token output for Style Dictionary (architecture)
tasks.experiment_outcome_note: Genuine 1-week Phase 0 research; out of session capacity after S1+S2+S3 reality-check pass.

tasks.title: Low Priority sweep (12 nice-to-haves, ordered by blast radius). DS Residual: 9 raw literals (final catchall)

transitions.note: Meta-feature opened to stress-test the v7.8.1 protocol against a 9-step roadmap (~10 weeks of compressed work). Backup snapshotted to ~/Documents/FitTracker2-backups/2026-05-07-pre-roadmap-stress-test/. Treated as an experiment per user instruction; data-collection mode active.

Experiment session-natural halt at ~92 min wall time. 1 sub-feature shipped (S3-G2, fitme-story PR #58 squash 8e595b3). 1 already-complete pre-session (S2). 1 partial blocked-external (S1). 6 not-started in this session (deferred). 8 v7.9 protocol candidates (F1-F8) surfaced — see case study §99. PRD-vs-execution gap analysis written. 0 kill criteria breached. Phases 1-7 of meta-feature explicitly merged into research → complete with documented latitude (the meta-feature itself is the experiment; sub-features ran the formal protocol).

research.duration_note: Experiment ran end-to-end as 'research' since the meta-feature is itself an experiment. Sub-feature S3-G2 ran its own internal phase split (research 7 + implementation 15 + testing 1 + review 1 + merge 0.3 + documentation 3).

cache_hits.task_context: Adapted ucc-passkey-auth full-cycle protocol baseline as the comparison reference for this experiment
Reused the make app-store-check pattern to detect S1 task-completion drift
